title: How to Analyze Chase Bank Statements for Lending Decisions
meta: Chase is the most common bank in the US. Learn how to read, analyze, and extract key financial data from Chase bank statements for mortgage and business loan underwriting.
content:
Chase Bank Statement Format

JPMorgan Chase is the largest bank in the United States with over 80 million customers, making Chase bank statements the most frequently reviewed documents in lending. Understanding Chase's specific statement format helps streamline analysis.

Chase Statement Structure

Chase bank statements are organized as follows:

  • Account summary: Opening balance, total deposits, total withdrawals, and closing balance for the period
  • Electronic deposits section: All ACH credits, direct deposits, and wire transfers received
  • Check deposits section: Individual check deposits with date and amount
  • Electronic withdrawals section: ACH debits, recurring payments, and bill payments
  • Check payments section: Checks written during the period
  • ATM/Debit card transactions: Point-of-sale and ATM transactions
  • Fees section: Monthly service fees, overdraft fees, and other charges

Finding Income in Chase Statements

Income deposits in Chase statements typically appear in the 'Electronic deposits' section as:

  • Direct deposits labeled 'DIRECTDEP' followed by the employer name
  • ACH credits from clients or customers
  • Zelle payments received (listed as 'ZELLE' credits)
  • Wire transfers with the sender's name

Identifying MCA Payments in Chase Statements

MCA repayments in Chase statements appear as daily or weekly 'ACH DEBIT' entries in the electronic withdrawals section. Look for entries like 'ACH DEBIT [MERCHANT NAME] PAYMENT' occurring daily with consistent amounts.

Chase Business vs. Personal Statements

Chase offers both personal checking and business checking accounts. Business statements (Chase Business Complete Checking, Chase Performance Business Checking, etc.) include additional sections showing business-specific features and may have different formatting than personal statements.

Automating Chase Statement Analysis

StatementScrub is optimized for Chase statement formats and can process any Chase bank statement PDF — personal or business — extracting all transaction data and generating a complete analysis report in under 30 seconds.
